title: Affiliate Marketing Partner for Unavoidable CRM
desc:
Freelance Affiliate Partner Wanted: Unavoidable CRM (25% Recurring Monthly Commission)

Company: Unavoidable Marketing
Location: Remote (UK-based leads preferred, worldwide considered)
Type: Freelance / Commission-only affiliate partnership
Commission: 25% of the monthly subscription for every client you refer, paid every single month for as long as that client stays with us

About Us

Unavoidable Marketing is a results-led digital marketing agency based in Leeds, West Yorkshire. We work with UK service businesses, trades, and dental practices, and we have run 40+ trade campaigns alongside case studies across automotive, storage, and leisure sectors. Our mission is simple: give small and medium service businesses the same operational firepower as the big players, without the overhead.

About the Product You'll Be Promoting

Unavoidable CRM is an AI-powered business management platform built for service businesses that are serious about growth. It's not just a CRM. It's the operational hub a modern service business runs on.

What's in the box:


AI receptionist and outbound calling that works 24/7, books appointments, captures customer details, and handles follow-ups automatically
Full CRM with pipelines and job management
Built-in invoicing and payments
SMS and email in one place
250+ features covering the full lifecycle from first enquiry to repeat booking


Pricing starts at £49/month with a 14-day free trial and no card required, which makes it an easy "yes" for the right

title: UFT Automation for Functional Testing
desc:
I'm seeking an experienced automation specialist to use UFT for functional testing of desktop applications.

Key Requirements:
- Expertise in UFT (Unified Functional Testing)
- Experience in functional testing automation
- Proficiency in desktop application testing
- Ability to deliver within budget constraints

Please include relevant experience in your application.

title: Energetic Website Copywriting Needed
desc:
I need fresh, exciting and energetic copy for the entire website of our young, fast-moving digital-marketing agency. We work with education and sports brands in the United States, Vietnam and India, and I want every visitor to feel that global, can-do spirit the moment they land on any page.

Scope of work  
• Home, About Us, Services and every additional page a complete agency site requires (contact, portfolio/case-studies, FAQs, etc.).  
• Copy must showcase our track record in ed-tech and sports marketing while weaving in our multicultural perspective.  
• Tone: upbeat, conversational, confidence-building—never stiff.  
• SEO-friendly structure with clear H1/H2 headings, engaging micro-copy for buttons and forms, and short, punchy paragraphs optimised for scan-readers.

Deliverable  
A single, well-organised doc (or shared Google Doc) containing page-by-page copy, ready for direct upload.

Acceptance criteria  
1. Voice and energy align with the brief.  
2. Keywords for “digital marketing agency,” “education marketing,” and “sports marketing” are integrated naturally.  
3. Each page includes a compelling CTA that feels authentic, not salesy.  
4. Final content passes Grammarly and Hemingway checks for clarity.

If this sounds like the kind of storytelling challenge you thrive on, let’s craft copy that instantly positions us as the go-to growth partner for education and sports brands worldwide.

title: Rapid Dual-Unit Classroom Plans
desc:
I have two ground-floor commercial retail units—CRU North and CRU South, each roughly 4,000–4,800 sq ft—and I need them re-imagined as independent teaching facilities. Every unit must accommodate five classrooms for 12–15 students, an office, a boardroom, plus its own reception/lounge. You will receive clean as-built CAD files the moment we agree; from there I expect a workable, layout for each suite within a few hours, not days.

Your first delivery should be a dimensioned plan for each CRU (PDF and the native file you draft in AutoCAD, Revit, or similar). Alongside that, I also need a stripped-down client-facing version—clear labels, minimal symbols, easy for non-architects to read. Just need a plan right now to present to client
If you can jump in immediately, iterate quickly, and communicate in real time, we can move forward today and keep refining once the first pass is on the screen.
